[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Buckeye''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Officer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Commander Buckeye served aboard [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]''. As part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] task force to establish [[XQ3 Platform]] ''[[NL-1]]'' as a foothold in the [[Pakuuni/Legends|Pakuuni]] [[Pakuuni system/Legends|system]]. During this engagement Commander Buckeye oversaw the final preparations of ''NL-1'' prior to Thrawn's inspection, moreover repelling several attacks from [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces in the system.

{{Char-stub}}
